translations.en: We’re having a picnic near the mill.
translations.es: Estamos de picnic cerca del molino.
translations.de: Wir picknicken in der Nähe der Mühle.
translations.it: Stiamo facendo un picnic vicino al mulino.
translations.ko: 우리는 방앗간 근처에서 소풍을 하고 있어요.
translations.pt: Estamos de piquenique perto do moinho.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đi dã ngoại gần cối xay.
translations.hi: हम चक्की के पास पिकनिक कर रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami sedang piknik di dekat kincir angin.
translations.ja: 風車の近くでピクニックをしています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun; generic 'we/one' that triggers 3rd-person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative 3sg of 'pique-niquer' ('to picnic').
Preposition meaning 'near', introducing a locative phrase.
Contraction of 'de + le' functioning as 'of the', introducing the noun complement.
Common noun; object of the preposition in the locative PP 'près du moulin'.

sentences.target: Tu vois le moulin au bout du chemin.
sentences.reading: /ty vwa lə mulɛ̃ o bu dy ʃəmɛ̃/

translations.fr: Tu vois le moulin au bout du chemin.
translations.ipa: /ty vwa lə mulɛ̃ o bu dy ʃəmɛ̃/
translations.en: You see the mill at the end of the path.
translations.es: Ves el molino al final del camino.
translations.de: Du siehst die Mühle am Ende des Weges.
translations.it: Vedi il mulino alla fine del sentiero.
translations.zh-Hans: 你看到小路尽头的磨坊。
translations.ru: Ты видишь мельницу в конце тропинки.
translations.pt: Você vê o moinho no fim do caminho.
translations.he: אתה רואה את הטחנה בקצה השביל.
translations.vi: Bạn thấy chiếc cối xay ở cuối con đường.
translations.nl: Je ziet de molen aan het einde van het pad.
translations.uk: Ти бачиш млин в кінці стежки.
translations.hu: Látod a malmot az ösvény végén.
translations.hi: तुम्हें रास्ते के अंत में चक्की दिखती है.
translations.el: Βλέπεις τον μύλο στο τέλος του μονοπατιού.
translations.nb: Du ser møllen ved enden av stien.
translations.id: Kamu melihat kincir di ujung jalan setapak.
translations.sv: Du ser kvarnen i slutet av stigen.
translations.da: Du ser møllen for enden af stien.
translations.ja: 小道の突き当たりに風車が見えます。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'vois'.
Main verb, present indicative 2sg of 'voir' ('to see').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'moulin'.
Common noun; direct object of 'vois'.
Contraction of 'à + le' functioning as 'at the/to the', introducing 'bout'.
Common noun; object of the preposition in 'au bout'.
Contraction of 'de + le' functioning as 'of the', introducing the complement 'chemin'.
Common noun; complement of 'du' in the PP 'du chemin'.

sentences.target: On répare le vieux moulin du village.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʁepaʁ lə vjø mulɛ̃ dy vilaʒ/

translations.fr: On répare le vieux moulin du village.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʁepaʁ lə vjø mulɛ̃ dy vilaʒ/
translations.en: We’re fixing the old village mill.
translations.es: Estamos reparando el viejo molino del pueblo.
translations.it: Stiamo riparando il vecchio mulino del villaggio.
translations.ko: 우리는 마을의 오래된 방앗간을 수리하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在修理村里的老磨坊。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度維修村入面嗰座舊磨坊。
translations.pt: Estamos consertando o velho moinho da aldeia.
translations.he: אנחנו מתקנים את טחנת הכפר הישנה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang sửa chiếc cối xay cũ của làng.
translations.hi: हम गाँव की पुरानी चक्की की मरम्मत कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Επισκευάζουμε τον παλιό μύλο του χωριού.
translations.id: Kami sedang memperbaiki kincir tua di desa.
translations.ja: 村の古い風車を修理しています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun; subject of 'répare'.
Main verb, present indicative 3sg of 'réparer' ('to repair/fix').
Definite article; determiner of 'moulin'.
Adjective, masculine singular; prenominal modifier of 'moulin'.
Common noun; direct object of 'répare'.
Contraction of 'de + le' functioning as 'of the', introducing a noun complement.
Common noun; complement of 'du' specifying which mill.

sentences.target: Je veux visiter un moulin dimanche.

translations.fr: Je veux visiter un moulin dimanche.
translations.en: I want to visit a mill on Sunday.
translations.es: Quiero visitar un molino el domingo.
translations.de: Ich möchte am Sonntag eine Mühle besichtigen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想在星期天参观一个磨坊。
translations.yue: 我想喺星期日參觀一間磨坊。
translations.ru: Я хочу посетить мельницу в воскресенье.
translations.pt: Quero visitar um moinho no domingo.
translations.he: אני רוצה לבקר בטחנה ביום ראשון.
translations.tr: Pazar günü bir değirmeni ziyaret etmek istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn đi thăm một cối xay vào Chủ nhật.
translations.nl: Ik wil zondag een molen bezoeken.
translations.uk: Я хочу відвідати млин у неділю.
translations.hu: Vasárnap meg akarok látogatni egy malmot.
translations.hi: मैं रविवार को एक चक्की देखने जाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να επισκεφτώ έναν μύλο την Κυριακή.
translations.nb: Jeg vil besøke en mølle på søndag.
translations.id: Saya ingin mengunjungi sebuah kincir pada hari Minggu.
translations.sv: Jag vill besöka en kvarn på söndag.
translations.ro: Vreau să vizitez o moară duminică.
translations.da: Jeg vil besøge en mølle på søndag.
translations.ja: 日曜日に風車を見学したいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'veux'.
Main verb, present indicative 1sg of 'vouloir'; takes infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'veux' expressing intended action.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'moulin'.
Common noun; direct object of 'visiter'.
Common noun denoting a day; used as a temporal complement.
